market.rules_primary: If Boyd Holbrook performs/ is announced as Felix Leiter in the next James Bond film, then the market resolves to Yes.
market.rules_secondary:
For the purposes of this Contract, Boyd Holbrook satisfies the Payout Criterion if either:

Official Announcement:
Boyd Holbrook is officially announced, confirmed, or publicly credited as cast to perform Felix Leiter in the next James Bond film, regardless of whether the performance ultimately occurs; OR

Actual Performance:
Boyd Holbrook appears on stage, on screen, or in recorded content as Felix Leiter in any official performance, showing, or release of the next James Bond film.

Additional clarification(s):

If the next James Bond film is entirely cancelled or abandoned before any official performance or release occurs, but Boyd Holbrook was officially announced in Felix Leiter, the Contract will resolve to “Yes.”

If multiple people are announced for Felix Leiter (e.g., alternating cast, dual casting), and Boyd Holbrook is among them, the Contract will resolve to “Yes.” [b][c]

The Contract may resolve to “No” prior to the Expiration Date if:
(a) the next James Bond film is cancelled or completes its run without Boyd Holbrook being announced or performing in Felix Leiter, or
(b) another person is officially announced as the sole exclusive performer for Felix Leiter.
market.title: Will Boyd Holbrook perform as Felix Leiter in the next James Bond film?
